nimblestudio.streamingimage.CfnAbout: The `AWS::NimbleStudio::StreamingImage` resource creates a streaming image in a studio. A streaming image defines the operating system and software to be used in an Amazon Nimble Studio streaming session.

nimblestudio.streamingimage.Description.Description: A human-readable description of the streaming image.

nimblestudio.streamingimage.Ec2ImageId.Description: The ID of an EC2 machine image with which to create the streaming image.

nimblestudio.streamingimage.Name.Description: A friendly name for a streaming image resource.

nimblestudio.streamingimage.StudioId.Description: The unique identifier for a studio resource. In Nimble Studio, all other resources are contained in a studio resource.

nimblestudio.streamingimage.Tags.Description: An array of key-value pairs to apply to this resource.  For more information, see [Tag](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-resource-tags.html).
